_comment: GAIA — Kalahar Reach (gym 6, Ground) leader intro. A per-leader copy of leader_intro.json (the shared scene cannot carry a name title), reusing Cicada's takehara_leader_intro geometry VERBATIM — the same relative+facingFrame+endBack:7 chaining so gym/engage_kalahar_leader still opens the battle from the endBack stage. Camera: pull up over the challenger's shoulder framing Gaia, a TIGHT ZOOM-IN dolly to her face (the z:-8.5 -> z:-6.8 close hold), a high side profile, then drop home. Theme is Ground/earthworks: gravel/sand break + a ravager-step tremor into rooted-dirt, with a sand-block dust burst then crit sparkle anchored ON the leader (uuid-anchored `execute at <uuid>`, so particles land on her regardless of camera). Keyframes + endBack:7 are unchanged from Cicada and MUST stay. IN-WORLD TUNING NEEDED: air-verify the framing/particle height at the real Kalahar Reach arena and nudge the particle ~y offset if the leader silhouette hovers; endBack 7 MUST match leader_intro so the post-scene battle opens correctly.

cues.command: execute at e0fd76d6-c1d2-4101-9169-88a5f2aa59e2 run particle block minecraft:sand ~ ~1 ~ 0.6 0.8 0.6 0.02 32 force
execute at e0fd76d6-c1d2-4101-9169-88a5f2aa59e2 run particle minecraft:crit ~ ~1 ~ 0.6 0.8 0.6 0.02 32 force
